Title: Verify successful login with valid credentials
Steps: 1. Navigate to e-commerce URL; 2. Enter valid email; 3. Enter valid password; 4. Click Login button
Expected_Result: User is redirected to the Dashboard and sees 'Welcome' message

Title: Verify unsuccessful login with wrong password
Steps: 1. Navigate to e-commerce URL; 2. Enter valid email; 3. Enter wrong password; 4. Click Login button
Expected_Result: User sees error message saying 'Invalid Credentials' and is not redirected to the Dashboard

Title: Verify unsuccessful login with empty username and password fields
Steps: 1. Navigate to e-commerce URL; 2. Leave email field and password field empty; 3. Click Login button
Expected_Result: User sees error message saying 'Empty fields' and is not redirected to the Dashboard

Title: Verify successful addition of single item to the shopping cart
Steps: 1. Navigate to e-commerce URL; 2. Enter valid email; 3. Enter valid password; 4. Click Login button; 5. Add the first item from the list of items to the shopping cart by clickin 'Add to Cart' button next to it
Expected_Result: Cart logo should change to 1 from 0 and checkout button should be visible

Title: Verify successful redirection to checkout page with an item in the cart
Steps: 1. Navigate to e-commerce URL; 2. Enter valid email and password; 3. Click login button; 4. Add the first item from the list to cart; 5. Click on cart icon; 6. Click on checkout button below cart icon
Expected_Result: User is redirected to the Checkout page

Title: Verify successful order submission with valid payment details
Steps: 1. Navigate to e-commerce URL and login with valid credentials; 2. Add the first item to cart; 3. Click on cart Icon; 4. Click on Checkout button; 5. Select payment method; 6. Enter valid payment details; 7. Complete payment by clicking on 'Pay Now' button
Expected_Result: User sees message saying 'Order Successful' with transaction details
